libGDX Behaviour Tree(0,12)
  PsiElement(TreeTokenType.task name)('t')(0,1)
  PsiWhiteSpace(' ')(1,2)
  PsiElement(TreeTokenType.attribute name)('a')(2,3)
  PsiElement(TreeTokenType.:)(':')(3,4)
  PsiElement(TreeTokenType.string)('""')(4,6)
  PsiErrorElement:TreeTokenType.attribute name, TreeTokenType.comment or TreeTokenType.end of line expected, got 'b'(6,7)
    PsiElement(TreeTokenType.number)('b')(6,7)
  PsiElement(TreeTokenType.:)(':')(7,8)
  PsiElement(TreeTokenType.string)('""')(8,10)
  PsiElement(TreeTokenType.end of line)('\n')(10,11)
  PsiElement(TreeTokenType.task name)('t')(11,12)
